verses.text: Israel mite aw, midangte bangin lungdamin kipak kei un. Na Pasian uh na nusia uh a, ama tungah na citak kei uh hi. Numei paktatte bangin mun citengah Baal tungah na kizuak uh a, a hong leina ante hangin na lungdam uh hi
Ahi zongin tua ante, oliv thaute, leh leenggahzute na khamtakun na nekha kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' gamsungah na omsuak kei ding uh a, Egypt gamah paikikin, Assiria gamsungah an sianglo na ne ding uh hi

Gamdangah na om laitakun Topa tungah leenggahzu tawh biakna na pia kei ding uh a, gan gawh biakna zong na bawl kei ding uh hi. Sihna phuala annek bangin, na annekte un zong a neteng hong ninsak ding hi. Na ante uh zong na gilvahna ding bek uh hi ding a, Topa' inn-ah khat zong na tun' kei ding uh hi
A kiseh pawi hunte leh Topa' pawi hun hong tun' ciangin bangcih ding na hi uh hiam

Lungkhamna hun hong tungin, mite na kithehthang uh ciangin, Egypt mite in note hong kaikhawm ding a, amau gam Memfis khuapi-ah vui ding bek na hi uh hi. Na inn na lote uh, kiak leh lopa in khuhcip lel ding hi

Gimthuakna hun hong tungta a, thukkikna hun hong tungta hi. Tua hun ciangin Israel mite in na thei ding uh hi. Note' mawhna hang leh note in kei nong muhdahluat manun, “Hih kamsangpa mihai hi; hih thumupa lungsim kicinglo hi,” nong ci uh hi

Ama mi Israel-te a vil dingin kamsang nasemin Pasian in kei hong sawl hi napi-in, ka paina khempeuhah vasa bangin thang nong siah uh a, Pasian' gamsung teekteek mahah mite pen kamsangpa' gal a suak mawk hi
A gamtatna uh gentheih lohin siahuai uh a, Gibeah khua-a a gamtat ngeite uh tawh kibang hi. Pasian in amau' mawhnate thei-in gim a pia ding hi

Topa in hih bangin gen hi: Israel kong muh cilin hoih mahmah a, sehnel gamsunga a gah a zun kiuhkeuh leenggah tawh kibang hi. Na pu na pate uh ka muh cilin hoih mahmah a, a hun ciangin a min a zun sitset theigah muh tawh kibang hi. Ahi zongin Baalpeor a tun' uh ciangin amaute in Baal milim bia pah uh ahih manin, amau' biak milimte ka muhdah zahin amaute nangawn ka mudah pah hi
Israel-te' minliatna teng vasa bangin lengmang ding a, amau' sung panin ta suak nawnloin, nupi gai, naupaai cih zong om nawnlo ding hi
Amaute in ta khoi mah ta le uh zong, suanlekhak a neihtheih ma-un ka khan'sihsak khin ding hi. Hih mite ka nungngat ciangin amaute tungah a lungkhamhuai lianpite a tung ding hi
Tu-in ka mukhol khin hi. Mite in sabet-a a bet ding leh, a thah ding bekin, Israel mite in a naupangte uh khahkhia ding uh hi, a ci hi
Topa aw, hih mite tungah na piak ding bang hong ngen ding ka hi hiam? Amaute tatolhsak in la, a nawizu uh kangsak in

Topa in hih bangin gen hi: Amau' gamtatsia khempeuh Gilgal phual pan a kipan hi a, tua muna kipanin amaute ka muhdah a kipan ahi hi. Amaute' gamtatsiatna hangin gamsung panin ka hawlkhia ding hi. Amaute ka it nawn kei ding hi. A uliante un kei hong langpang uh hi
Israel mite ahih leh a zung a keu, gah a gahlo ding singkung tawh kibang hi. Amaute in ta nei ta mah le uh zong, amau' it mahmah tua a tate uh ka thahsak veve ding hi, ci hi
Amaute in a thu ngailo uh ahih manin ka Pasian in a mite a nial ding hi. Minam dangte lakah a vakvai mite a suak ding uh hi.
